Order To Show Cause Re Writ Of Mandate
Off Calendar Oct-03-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEAR: Robert W. Dunlap, Esq. 495-0112 for petitioner & moving party; William J. McMahon, Deputy Atty General 510/622-2209 for respondent & opposing party.
RULING: Argued and the Court "adopted" its tentative ruling (PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE DENIED. PETITIONER RESPONSIBLE TO RESET HEARING DATE AND PRESERVE EVIDENCE. HEARING REQUIRED. PARTIES TO PROVIDE SUSPENSION DATES OF LICENSE AND DATES OF TEMPORARY LICENSE). Order signed in open court. (302/AJR/MD) Court Reporter Patricia M. Evezich, CSR #1193
